## Decision 901: Fixture -- past review_by surfaces as manual-review-due (Decided)

**Status:** Decided
**Date:** 2020-01-01

**Reversal conditions:**
This fixture exists to drive tests/test_decision_conditions.py's past-review_by ->
manual-review-due case, and PLAN-reversal-condition-monitor.yaml verification_plan step 3
(a LIVE CLI invocation against this file). No production predicate fires here.

```yaml reversal-conditions
decision: 901
review_by: 2020-01-01
on_trigger: "re-decide via /plan; update or re-arm this stanza"
conditions:
  - id: context-only-condition
    kind: manual
    description: "manual context condition; never auto-fires"
```
